description_text:
BMC Resmart GII Auto CPAP Machine

The BMC RESmart GII Auto CPAP is a Continuous Positive Airway Pressure (CPAP) machine that is used to treat sleep apnea. In case you are on a budget, this is your best choice for treating your breathing disorders as it is a budget-friendly machine. Some key features of this device include:


	
	Auto-adjusting pressure: The machine automatically adjusts the pressure to the optimal level for the individual, based on real-time data.
	
	
	Reslex technology: This feature allows for pressure relief during exhalation, making the therapy more comfortable for the user.
	
	
	Data recording: The machine records sleep therapy data via SD card and iCode, you can retrieve sleep data effortlessly
	
	
	Easy to use: The machine has simple user interface, making it easy to use and set up.
	
	
	Heated humidification and Delay off: The machine comes with heated humidifier and You will find a Delay-off feature that will safeguard against some humidity hazards
	


What's in the Box?


	BMC Resmart GII Auto CPAP( main unit)
	Humidifier
	Mask
	Hose
	Adapter
	Filter
	Carry Bag
	User Manual
